Klasse KnapsackGAConfig

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
public class KnapsackGAConfig extends Object
Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) to solve the 0/1 knapsack optimization problem. This class bundles all GA parameters, evolutionary operators, problem-specific settings, and data services.

The configuration can be initialized with default values or overridden using an external AppConfig. GA components (selection, crossover, mutation, fitness function) must be assigned before creating the algorithm.

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    ConsoleOutput
    consoleOutput
    Console output handler for logging GA progress.
    String
    constraintStrategy
     
    Crossover<Integer>
    crossover
    Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.
    double
    crossoverRate
    Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.
    CsvDataService
    dataService
    Data service for loading item weights and values from CSV or other sources.
    FitnessFunction<Integer>
    fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating knapsack solutions.
    List<Item>
    items
     
    double
    knapsackCapacity
    Maximum weight capacity of the knapsack.
    int
    maxGenerations
    Maximum number of generations the GA will run.
    Mutation<Integer>
    mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    double
    mutationRate
    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.
    int
    populationSize
    Number of individuals in each generation.
    Random
    random
    Random number generator used by GA components.
    Selection<Integer>
    selection
    Selection operator used to choose parents.
    boolean
    useGreedyInitialization
     

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    KnapsackGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, AppConfig config)
    Creates a knapsack GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    GeneticAlgorithm<Integer>
    createGeneticAlgorithm()
    Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • populationSize

      public int populationSize
      Number of individuals in each generation.

    • crossoverRate

      public double crossoverRate
      Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.

    • mutationRate

      public double mutationRate
      Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.

    • maxGenerations

      public int maxGenerations
      Maximum number of generations the GA will run.

    • knapsackCapacity

      public double knapsackCapacity
      Maximum weight capacity of the knapsack.

    • useGreedyInitialization

      public boolean useGreedyInitialization

    • constraintStrategy

      public String constraintStrategy

    • items

      public List<Item> items

    • selection

      public Selection<Integer> selection
      Selection operator used to choose parents.

    • crossover

      public Crossover<Integer> crossover
      Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.

    • mutation

      public Mutation<Integer> mutation
      Mutation operator used to introduce variation.

    • fitnessFunction

      public FitnessFunction<Integer> fitnessFunction
      Fitness function evaluating knapsack solutions.

    • random

      public Random random
      Random number generator used by GA components.

    • dataService

      public CsvDataService dataService
      Data service for loading item weights and values from CSV or other sources.

    • consoleOutput

      public ConsoleOutput consoleOutput
      Console output handler for logging GA progress.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • KnapsackGAConfig

      public KnapsackGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, AppConfig config)
      Creates a knapsack GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
      Parameter:
      consoleOutput - console output handler for GA messages
      config - optional external configuration; may be null

  • Methodendetails

    • createGeneticAlgorithm

      public GeneticAlgorithm<Integer> createGeneticAlgorithm()
      Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.
      Gibt zurück:
      a ready-to-run genetic algorithm instance for the knapsack problem
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if required GA components are missing
